179774.data: {"chat_id":"[*USER*]","text":"\"To download a file, you need to have a subscription. If you're a new user, purchase Stock Coin to recharge your wallet, and then you can acquire a subscription. By typing 'Subscription' in groups, you can view links to groups and the steps to purchase a subscription from the bot. If you have any issues or questions, please articulate them fully and in English. If you require files quickly over an extended period, use the files menu. There is no time constraint in this section. Thank you for choosing N1Stock.\"\n\n@N1Stock_Bot"}

772483.data: {"chat_id":"[*USER*]","text":"Those who cling to death,live.\nThose who cling to life,die."}
